heading: Payne fellowship authorization
label: 2736d Payne fellowship authorization
notes: DefinitionFor definition of “Secretary” as used in this section, see , set out as a note under .section 5002 of Pub. L. 117–81section 263c of this title

children.heading: In general
children.label: a In general
children.text: Undergraduate and graduate components of the Donald M. Payne International Development Fellowship Program may conduct outreach to attract outstanding students with an interest in pursuing a Foreign Service career who represent diverse ethnic and socioeconomic backgrounds.

children.heading: Review of past programs
children.label: b Review of past programs
children.text: The Secretary shall review past programs designed to increase minority representation in international affairs positions.
